targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), li AS (SELECT * FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT mv AS value FROM li

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (interval_end || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, mv AS MV, monthly_income AS MoIncome FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (interval_end || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, mv AS MV, monthly_income AS MoIncome FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end

targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT (interval_end || 'T00:00:00Z') AS time, vol_30d_pct AS Vol30, var_95_1d_pct AS VaR95, cvar_90_1d_pct AS CVaR90 FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end

targets.queryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), li AS (SELECT interval_label FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, round(weight_pct,2) AS WtPct, round(market_value,0) AS MV, round(pnl_pct,2) AS PnlPct, round(projected_monthly_dividend,2) AS MoInc, substr(COALESCE(risk_quality_category,''),1,14) AS Risk FROM period_interval_holdings WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AND interval_label=(SELECT interval_label FROM li) ORDER BY weight_pct DESC LIMIT 5
targets.rawQueryText: WITH latest AS (SELECT period_start_date, period_end_date FROM period_summary WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND is_rolling=0 ORDER BY period_end_date DESC LIMIT 1), li AS (SELECT interval_label FROM period_intervals WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) ORDER BY interval_end DESC LIMIT 1) SELECT substr(symbol,1,8) AS Sym, round(weight_pct,2) AS WtPct, round(market_value,0) AS MV, round(pnl_pct,2) AS PnlPct, round(projected_monthly_dividend,2) AS MoInc, substr(COALESCE(risk_quality_category,''),1,14) AS Risk FROM period_interval_holdings WHERE period_type='MONTH' AND period_start_date=(SELECT period_start_date FROM latest) AND period_end_date=(SELECT period_end_date FROM latest) AND interval_label=(SELECT interval_label FROM li) ORDER BY weight_pct DESC LIMIT 5
